summary: Mobile responsiveness testing for Turkish Gallery CRM (Aslanbaş Oto). All major mobile UI fixes verified: login/registration work on mobile (390x844), AddCarModal uses 2-column grid on mobile vs 4-column on desktop, tabs show shortened labels on mobile, footer buttons stack vertically on mobile. PromoCardModal specs wrap into 3-column grid and body sections stack vertically. ReportModal type buttons wrap properly. Finance page and Dashboard display correctly on mobile. Fixed tab label CSS for proper responsive display.
passed_tests: Mobile Login (390x844): Page loads, form fills, login successful - SUCCESS
Mobile Registration: Toggle to register mode, all fields visible and fillable without layout issues - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal: Tabs show shortened labels (Genel, Eksper, Fotoğr, Sahibl), 2-column grid on mobile - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal Scroll: All fields including Sigorta dates, Alış/Satış Fiyatı, Açıklama visible - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal Ekspertiz Tab: Expertise diagram and mechanical parts display properly - SUCCESS
Mobile AddCarModal Footer: Buttons stack vertically (Kaydet on top, İptal below) - SUCCESS
Mobile PromoCardModal: Specs row uses 3-column grid, body sections stack vertically - SUCCESS
Mobile PromoCardModal: Expertise diagram with ORJ/BOY/DEĞ labels visible - SUCCESS
Mobile ReportModal: Report type buttons wrap properly (Genel, İşletme, Stok / Satılan, Kapora, Araç) - SUCCESS
Mobile ReportModal: Date inputs accessible, stats cards stack vertically - SUCCESS
Mobile FinancePage: Summary cards stack (Gelir, Gider, Net), search/filter controls proper spacing - SUCCESS
Mobile Dashboard: Stat cards in 2-column grid, chart displays properly, bottom nav visible - SUCCESS
Desktop AddCarModal (1920x800): 4-column grid maintained (Plaka, Model Yılı, Marka, Model in row) - SUCCESS
Desktop AddCarModal: Full tab labels visible, footer buttons side by side - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsiveness fixes verified working: 1) Login uses min-h-[100dvh] for mobile keyboard handling 2) AddCarModal grids change from 4→2 cols on mobile (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4) 3) Tabs show abbreviated labels on mobile via hidden sm:inline spans 4) Footer buttons stack via flex-col-reverse sm:flex-row 5) PromoCardModal specs use grid-cols-3 sm:flex 6) Dialog base uses max-w-[calc(100%-1rem)] on mobile. One minor CSS issue: tab labels show duplicate text on desktop (both full and abbreviated).

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen
